title: F34's Vanilla+ ModPack
body:
# F34's Vanilla+ ModPack ### Update coming soon 👀 ## Description: The F34's Vanilla+ ModPack is a modpack that aims to replace OptiFine, it includes performance improvements thanks to mods like Sodium and Lithium, graphics thanks to Iris and other mods for shaders, dynamic lights etc ... It also reintroduces OptiFine texturepacks support thanks to many other mods. ## Mod List:
Spoiler

- AmbientSounds 5 - Animatica - AntiGhost - Architectury API - Armor Chroma for Fabric - Better Dropped Items - Better Mount HUD - BetterF3 - Bobby - Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric) - Custom Entity Models - CIT Resewn - ClickThrough - Cloth Config API - Clumps - Colormatic - CompleteConfig - Continuity - CreativeCore - Cull Less Leaves - DashLoader - Dynamic FPS - EditSign - EntityCulling - Fabric Language Kotlin - Fabric Tailor - Fabrishot - FabSit - Falling Leaves - FerriteCore - ForgetMeChunk - In-Game Account Switcher - Indium - Inspecio - InvMove - Iris Shaders - Item Model Fix - Krypton - LambdaBetterGrass - LambDynamicLights - Language Reload - LazyDFU - Lithium - Main Menu Credits - Memory Leak Fix - Mixin Conflict Helper - Mod Menu - MoreChatHistory - More Culling - No Fade - No Telemetry - Ok Zoomer - Pingspam - Plasmo Voice - Quilted Fabric API (QFAPI) / Quilt Standard Libraries (QSL) - Server Hats - Smooth Boot (Fabric) - Sodium Extra - Sodium - Sound Physics Remastered - Starlight (Fabric) - ToolTipFix - WorldEdit CUI (Fabric)

## FAQ: > Q: How can i install/update it > > A: I suggest you to install/update it using ATLauncher or MultiMC (With MultiMC you need to update it manually) > Q: Can i play on Vanilla Server? > > A: Yes, you can play on any Vanilla Server and if OptiFine is not considered to be a hack on a server, most likely this modpack will not be either > Q: I found a mod that is missing in the modpack how can i suggest it? > > A: You can suggest it on [Discord](https://discord.gg/dCdJPkCpPm)
